compound.name: ARGX-119
compound.mechanism: Bivalent agonist antibody binds the MuSK Frizzled-like (Fz/CRD) domain, driving MuSK dimerization and trans-autophosphorylation independent of agrin — reconstitutes the postsynaptic arm of NMJ signaling downstream of the agrin/LRP4 ligand step.

target.name: muscle-associated receptor tyrosine kinase
target.ot_sarcopenia_or_aging_association: ABSENT — sarcopenia / age-related muscle loss do not appear in MuSK's Open Targets disease associations (1417 diseases)
target.gtex_muscle_tpm: MuSK expressed in skeletal muscle; strongly enriched at the NMJ postsynapse

pathway.axis: agrin -> LRP4 -> MuSK -> DOK7 (+ rapsyn -> AChR clustering)

exposure_safety.routes_doses: single ascending IV 0.005-15 mg/kg; SC 5 mg/kg; weekly multiple ascending IV 0.3-5 mg/kg
exposure_safety.tolerability: well tolerated with a favorable safety profile in healthy adults
exposure_safety.pk: nonlinear PK / target-mediated drug disposition; Cmax mean 0.1-343 ug/mL; ~6-fold AUC increase
exposure_safety.immunogenicity: anti-drug antibodies comparable to placebo (16.0% vs 16.7% incidence); no impact on PK or safety
